name: @slamb2k/mad-skills
description: Claude Code skills collection — full lifecycle development tools

scripts.build: npm run build:manifests && npm run build:skills
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run validate && npm run build:manifests
scripts.test:unit: node --test scripts/lib/superpowers.test.js scripts/lib/feature-dev.test.js scripts/lib/eval-references.test.js scripts/lib/eval-response.test.js hooks/lib/lifecycle.test.cjs hooks/lib/logbook.test.cjs tests/packaging.test.cjs
scripts.test: npm run validate && npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run eval
